name: dev.ucp.shopping.saved_instruments
title: Saved Payment Instruments Extension
description: Extends cart and checkout response shapes with the set of payment instruments the authenticated user has saved with this business. Surfaces saved instruments as response-only display data; selection flows through the existing payment.instruments[] semantics. Access is gated by the `dev.ucp.shopping.saved_instruments:read` scope listed in `dev.ucp.common.identity_linking.config.scopes`. The extension carries no credential material — concrete credential material is obtained at checkout time per the business's declared payment handler.

saved_instrument.title: Saved Payment Instrument
saved_instrument.description: A payment instrument the user has previously saved with this business. The `id` is a stable, business-assigned, opaque identifier the platform references via `payment.instruments[].id` to select this instrument for a cart or checkout. Saved instruments expose display-safe metadata only; the `credential` field MUST NOT be populated on this surface.

default.description: True if this instrument is the user's default saved instrument with this business. At most one entry in `saved_instruments` MUST set `default: true`.

credential.description: Saved instruments MUST NOT include a credential. Concrete credential material is obtained at checkout time via the business's declared payment handler, not from this extension.

saved_instruments.description: Set of payment instruments the authenticated user has saved with this business. MAY be empty when the user has no saved instruments. Ordering is business-defined; platforms SHOULD NOT infer a default from list position — use the `default` flag on each instrument instead.

dev.ucp.shopping.cart.title: Cart with Saved Instruments
dev.ucp.shopping.cart.description: Cart response extended with the authenticated user's saved payment instruments under `payment.saved_instruments`.

dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.title: Checkout with Saved Instruments
dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.description: Checkout response extended with the authenticated user's saved payment instruments under `payment.saved_instruments`.
